3284080.name: Liber Magus
3284080.description:
Liber Magus is a first-person roguelike game with farm elements. You take on the role of a powerful mage living on an island and creating spells in the spell editor. Why? To destroy as many enemies as possible as quickly as possible.

Story

Expelled from the academy for conducting overly dangerous experiments, you live the life of a hermit on an island filled with magic and magical creatures.

Evil lurks in the dungeons of this island, and by defeating it, you will restore your reputation as a respected mage.

Dungeons

The dungeons on the island are randomly generated. Within the allotted time, you must reach the end of the dungeon, defeating all enemies with your magic and collecting as much loot as possible.

Progress

If you die in the dungeon, you will wake up in your bed. Maybe it was a dream or something else? In any case, the experience gained in the dungeon will remain with you, which cannot be said about the items.

Farm

For a long dungeon run, it is worth preparing thoroughly. For this, you have an entire farm at your disposal. Grow vegetables and potions, take care of animals.
3284080.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 波兰语, 俄语
